message:
Use pathWithBase for all internal links

Fix hardcoded absolute paths in components to support subdirectory
deployments:

- PageTitle.astro: Home breadcrumb link
- TenzirFooter.astro: Documentation, Changelog links
- InteractiveDocsStructure.astro: Section images and links
- See-also components: Op, Fn, Guide, Tutorial, Explanation, Integration

Also add @utils path alias to tsconfig.json and standardize all utils
imports to use it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
